title: Rand (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rand''' could mean:

*[[Rand (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Rand'']], a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*[[Rand (worker)|Rand]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] settler who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Hutta]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].
*[[Rand (corporal)|Rand]], a Human [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] of the [[Galactic Republic]] during the [[Galactic War]].
*[[Rand (Alderaanian)|Rand]], an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay controller.
*[[Rand (commander)|Rand]], a Human [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Infinite Army]].
*[[Atton Rand]], a pilot who aided the Jedi Exile [[Meetra Surik]] in defeating the [[Sith Triumvirate]].
*[[Rand Ko]], an [[Imperial Knight]].
*[[Rand Talor]], a Rebel officer who participated in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]].
*[[Kella Rand]], a reporter who worked for the [[Galactic News Network]].
*[[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']], a [[Imperial II-class frigate|Class II Frigate]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] which was sometimes simply referred to as the ''Rand''.
*[[Gehren Rand]], a [[human]] [[Gender|female]] [[Jedi Initiate]]

{{Disambig}}
